ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Note type used for newly created cards. Only types with "Front" and "Back" fields are supported. Existing cards keep their original note type. Connect Anki to get autocomplete suggestions.
ast.target: 用于新创建卡片的笔记类型。仅支持具有 \"Front\" 和 \"Back\" 字段的类型。现有卡片保留其原始笔记类型。连接 Anki 以获取自动完成建议。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow collapsing/expanding single-column Anki tables in preview and source view.
ast.target: 允许在预览和源视图中折叠/展开单列 Anki 表格。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, newly rendered single-column Anki tables start collapsed.
ast.target: 启用后，新渲染的单列 Anki 表格默认处于折叠状态。

ast.target: AnkiConnect连接失败。请确认Anki已打开且已安装AnkiConnect插件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: AnkiConnect did not return a valid note ID.

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 答案表格的切换开关已在设置中禁用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: AnkiConnect is not available. Please make sure Anki is running and AnkiConnect is installed.
ast.target: AnkiConnect不可用。请确保Anki正在运行且已安装AnkiConnect插件。
